query_title: Precious: Based on the Novel 'Push' by Sapphire

recommendations.title: The Paperboy
recommendations.overview: A reporter returns to his Florida hometown to investigate a case involving a death row inmate.

recommendations.title: The United States vs. Billie Holiday
recommendations.overview: Billie Holiday spent much of her career being adored by fans. In the 1940s, the government targeted Holiday in a growing effort to racialize the war on drugs, ultimately aiming to stop her from singing her controversial ballad, "Strange Fruit."

recommendations.title: The Deliverance

recommendations.title: The Butler

recommendations.title: Flipped
recommendations.overview: When Juli meets Bryce in the second grade, she knows it's true love. After spending six years trying to convince Bryce the same, she's ready to give up - until he starts to reconsider.

recommendations.title: Badhaai Ho
recommendations.overview: A 25-year-old man tries to suppress his embarrassment when his mother announces that she is pregnant.

recommendations.title: Like Stars on Earth
recommendations.overview: Ishaan Awasthi is an eight-year-old whose world is filled with wonders that no one else seems to appreciate. Colours, fish, dogs, and kites don't seem important to the adults, who are much more interested in things like homework, marks, and neatness.

recommendations.title: If Beale Street Could Talk
recommendations.overview: After her fiance is falsely imprisoned, a pregnant African-American woman sets out to clear his name and prove his innocence.

recommendations.title: Battle Royale
recommendations.overview: In the future, the Japanese government captures a class of ninth-grade students and forces them to kill each other under the revolutionary "Battle Royale" act.

recommendations.title: Baby Boy
recommendations.overview: The story of Jody, a misguided, 20-year-old African-American who is really just a baby boy finally forced-kicking and screaming to face the commitments of real life. Streetwise and jobless, he has not only fathered two children by two different women
